title: Nigeria signs global pact to tackle AI privacy abuse
description: Nigeria joins over 60 countries in a global pact to tackle AI privacy abuse, committing to responsible AI use and protecting citizens from misuse.Read More: https://punchng.com/nigeria-signs-global-pact-to-tackle-ai-privacy-abuse/

title: Doctored AI Video Falsely Claims Senate Opposition Leader Said Pakistan Allowed US Airspace for Attack on Iran - Daily Soon Times
description: A doctored AI-generated video falsely claims Senate opposition leader Allama Raja Nasir said Pakistan allowed US airspace for attacks on Iran. Authorities confirm the video is fake and urge people to verify information before sharing.

title: As banks tap AI for big tasks, local startups get a prompt - The Economic Times
description: As banks tap AI for big tasks, local startups get a prompt The Economic TimesHow Agentic AI Is transforming financial services in India EYGovernance is the real differentiator in AI-led lending: Markandey Upadhyay, Piramal Finance IndiatimesMoving beyond bots to agentic AI KPMGGenerative AI - led Digital Transformation in Banking: Driving Superior Customer Experience, One customer at a time Elets BFSI

title: With a little nudge from RBI, banks tap AI for bigger tasks
description: While automation of call centres saw the first wave of AI adoption in the highly regulated sector, more applications are getting powered by this technology now. The remit of AI applications widened after the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) listed down broad guidelines in August in the Free-AI regulatory document, detailing the adoption of AI in banks’ internal workflow.

title: Human still in driver's seat: Ford chief AI officer Franziska Bell
description: The use cases span design, engineering, quality assurance, customer support, data management, and software development, and most of these cutting-edge advancements are being through teams in Chennai and Bangalore.
